sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Huntawp a Topa muh ciang
A phatna la ih sak ciang
Tua ni gualzawhna a sang pen hi ding
Midikte tawh khat vei ciang
Galkhat mun nuam ih tung ciang
Tua ni gualzawhna a sang pen hi ding

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Tua ni gualzawhna a sangpen a sangpen hi ding
Tua ni gualzawhna a sangpen hi ding
Kumpipa inn ihtung ciang
Hosiana cin ihsak ciang
Tua ni gualzawhna a sangpen hi ding

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Misiang te tawh khatvei ciang
Khamkong zing ih zuih khop ciang
Tua ni gualzawhna a sangpen hi ding
Van mite tawh khat vei ciang
Tawntung la ih sak khop ciang
Tua ni gualzawhna a sangpen hi ding

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Haksatna teng hong bei ciang
Kumpi lukhu ih ngah ciang
Tua ni gualzawhna a sangpen hi ding
A tawntung mun ih tun ciang
Kumpipa mai ih din ciang
Tua ni gualzawhna a sangpen hi ding
